Your Locker. Your Timeline.

Quick Ship (ships in 2–4 weeks)

Stadium & Elite lockers in 24" or 30" widths, Light Gray or Dark Gray. Ships in 2 to 4 weeks.

Shop Quick Ship →

Custom (8–12 weeks)

Custom orders are 8–12 weeks. Any size, any wood, phenolic, or other materials. We build it your way at a price that beats the rest.

Request Custom Quote →

Price Match Guarantee

We'll match any USA-based competitor's price on comparable wood sports lockers. Same style, wood grade & features. Valid quote required.

LOCKERS

Premium wood. Unbeatable price.

Custom sports lockers for collegiate and professional teams. Quick ship in 2–4 weeks or full custom in 8–12 weeks. 30+ years experience. Lifetime guarantee.

Shop Now

why choose playerstall

key features

01
Design

Modular Design

Damaged parts can be replaced individually—no need to replace the entire locker.

02
Customization

Full Customization

Team colors, logos, player names—unlimited design options for your brand.

03
Quality

Premium Materials

Full 3/4" solid wood construction built to last a lifetime.

04
Service

Free Design Service

Every project starts with a free custom design consultation.

why our prices

EFFICIENT PRODUCTION.
UNBEATABLE VALUE.

We run an efficient operation. We focus on a core few models and don't stop production—no constant changeovers, no idle time. That lets us keep costs down and pass the savings to you. High-quality lockers at unbeatable prices: it's not magic, it's smart manufacturing.

Learn More

why choose us

WHY WOOD OUTPERFORMS
METAL

After 30+ years in the business, we've seen it all. Wood lockers aren't just a trend—they're a superior choice. Wood creates a professional, prestigious atmosphere that metal simply can't match. When properly cared for, wood outlasts metal. Our lockers have been in use for 15+ years and still look professional.

Learn More
free

FREE CUSTOM DESIGN CONSULTATION

Get expert advice from 30+ years of experience. No obligation, just professional guidance to create the perfect locker room solution for your team.

Get Started Today

Call us at 1 (888) 58-STALL

how it works

OUR PROCESS

1

Free Consultation

We start with a free custom design consultation to understand your needs, space, and vision.

2

Custom Design

Our team creates a custom design tailored to your specific space and requirements.

3

Manufacturing

We manufacture your lockers using premium 3/4" solid wood and highest quality materials.

Free Custom Design Consultation +

Every project starts with a free custom design consultation. We'll discuss your needs, space, budget, and vision to understand exactly what you're looking for. No obligation, just expert advice from 30+ years of experience.

Lifetime Guarantee +

We're so confident in the quality of our wood sports lockers that we offer a lifetime guarantee on every locker we build. Our unique modular design means damaged parts can be replaced individually—no need to replace the entire locker.

Made in Canada +

100% manufactured in North America. We support local manufacturing and maintain the highest quality standards. Our family business is personally invested in every project—your success is our reputation.

Sport-Specific Solutions +

Every sport has unique equipment needs. We design lockers optimized for football, hockey, basketball, baseball, soccer, and lacrosse. From spacious football lockers to reinforced hockey lockers, we have solutions for every sport.

PLAY OF THE WEEK

Powerful Sports Theme

Taste the Victory

testimonials

trusted by champions

what our clients say

Head Coach

"These lockers aren't just furniture—they're an investment in our culture. Our recruits notice the difference immediately."

Athletic Director

"After 15 years, our PlayerStall lockers still look professional. The modular design has saved us thousands in repairs."

Facilities Manager

"The free custom design service made all the difference. They understood our space and created the perfect solution."

Hockey Coach

"The reinforced construction handles our heavy hockey gear perfectly. These lockers are built to last."

Ready to Transform Your Locker Room?

Get a free custom design consultation. No obligation, just expert advice from 30+ years of experience.

Get Free Consultation View Our Work

PlayerStall

Premium wood lockers at unbeatable prices. Quick ship in 2–4 weeks (Stadium & Elite) or custom wood, phenolic & more in 8–12 weeks. Price match guarantee. 30+ years experience.
